name: oci-codex-skills
description: A public bundle of reusable Codex skills for research, cloud architecture, focused execution, stakeholder artifacts, pipelines, and Oracle-style design.

interface.shortDescription: Reusable Codex workflows from the public OCI repo.
interface.longDescription: Install the public Codex skills maintained in gmaiera/OCI, including research, cloud architecture, focused work, stakeholder export, pipeline, and Oracle design workflows.
defaultPrompt: Use the OCI Codex skills to organize this work.
